s-fast-track.golden_path: User reports a confirmed bug in a single module with a clear reproduction step — route directly to s4 without full pipeline
s-fast-track.adversarial: User asks to fast-track a new checkout flow that touches the payment, inventory, and notification modules

s0-brainstorm.golden_path: User says 'I want to make the app feel faster' with no further detail — clarify the actual problem before writing any spec
s0-brainstorm.adversarial: User has a detailed requirements document and asks to brainstorm additional features on top of it

s0-semantic-validate.golden_path: Verify that test-results.json contains zero failures before marking s4-tdd as complete
s0-semantic-validate.adversarial: User asks to check whether a SKILL.md follows the 6 production quality criteria

s0-skill-budget.golden_path: Audit a newly written SKILL.md to confirm it stays within the 105-line D/I/S budget before merging
s0-skill-budget.adversarial: User asks to evaluate whether the skill handles edge cases correctly and has proper negative triggers

s0-trace-feature.golden_path: Trace how a password-reset request flows through the codebase from the API endpoint to the email service
s0-trace-feature.adversarial: User asks to design the architecture for a new real-time notification system

s1-define-rules.golden_path: Set up coding standards and security baseline for a new project before any code is written
s1-define-rules.adversarial: User asks to skip the security section and only define formatting rules

s1-config-context.golden_path: Configure agent role and project context at the start of a new project session
s1-config-context.adversarial: User tries to reconfigure mid-task to change scope without resetting context

s1-lock-tech-stack.golden_path: Lock framework versions and dependencies for a greenfield TypeScript project
s1-lock-tech-stack.adversarial: User wants to defer version pinning until after implementation starts

s1-git-guardrails.golden_path: Set up branch protection and commit hooks for a team repository
s1-git-guardrails.adversarial: User asks to allow direct pushes to main as a temporary convenience

s2-capture-vision.golden_path: User has a vague product idea and needs it captured as a vision spec before any technical discussion
s2-capture-vision.adversarial: User asks to skip clarifying questions and immediately write the spec based on incomplete input

s2-align-req.golden_path: Resolve conflicting interpretations between two stakeholders' requirements before structuring
s2-align-req.adversarial: User asks to resolve conflicts by picking the simpler option without stakeholder confirmation

s2-struct-req.golden_path: Convert an aligned vision spec into Gherkin BDD scenarios for a user authentication feature
s2-struct-req.adversarial: User asks to write PRD sections they have not yet approved in the vision phase

s2-snapshot-ctx.golden_path: Snapshot current project state and requirements before starting a new iteration
s2-snapshot-ctx.adversarial: User asks to overwrite the previous snapshot rather than creating a new dated one

s3-eval-system.golden_path: Evaluate impact of adding a notification system to an existing monolith with a shared database
s3-eval-system.adversarial: User asks to skip the impact analysis and go straight to architecture design

s3-design-arch.golden_path: Design data model and API contract for a new order management microservice
s3-design-arch.adversarial: User asks to use a technology not in the locked tech stack because it is more familiar

s3-breakdown-wbs.golden_path: Break down a payment integration feature into atomic implementation tasks
s3-breakdown-wbs.adversarial: User asks to combine multiple business domains into a single task to reduce ticket count

s3-build-dag.golden_path: Build an execution DAG for 15 implementation tasks with inter-service dependencies
s3-build-dag.adversarial: User asks to parallelise tasks that share a database schema migration

s4-setup-env.golden_path: Initialise a git worktree and configure sandbox for a new feature branch
s4-setup-env.adversarial: User asks to reuse the main branch environment instead of creating an isolated sandbox

s4-impl-task.golden_path: Implement a single atomic task from the WBS: add rate-limiting middleware
s4-impl-task.adversarial: User asks to implement multiple WBS tasks in one session to save time

s4-tdd.golden_path: Write failing tests for a new user registration endpoint before implementation
s4-tdd.adversarial: User asks to write tests after implementation because the spec is still changing

s4-local-debug.golden_path: Debug a stack trace from a failing integration test with an ambiguous error message
s4-local-debug.adversarial: User asks to skip log analysis and push a speculative fix to see if it works

s5-sast-lint.golden_path: Run static analysis and security scan on changed files before opening a PR
s5-sast-lint.adversarial: User asks to ignore a SQL injection warning because the input is considered trusted

s5-audit-rules.golden_path: Audit the codebase for violations of the architecture rules defined in RULES.md
s5-audit-rules.adversarial: User asks to mark a RULES.md violation as acceptable without updating the rules file

s5-pr-review.golden_path: Review a PR that adds a new payment flow for logic bugs and compliance issues
s5-pr-review.adversarial: User asks to approve the PR despite unresolved logic issues to meet a deadline

s5-fix-optimize.golden_path: Fix a confirmed performance regression in the database query layer
s5-fix-optimize.adversarial: User asks to fix unrelated issues in the same commit to reduce PR count

s6-test-integration.golden_path: Run integration tests across the auth and order modules after merging both feature branches
s6-test-integration.adversarial: User asks to skip integration tests because unit tests already pass

s6-test-e2e.golden_path: Run end-to-end tests for the checkout user journey across browser and mobile viewports
s6-test-e2e.adversarial: User asks to defer E2E tests until after the release candidate is cut

s6-test-perf.golden_path: Run load tests to verify the API handles 1000 concurrent requests within SLA
s6-test-perf.adversarial: User asks to use production traffic as the load test to avoid setup overhead

s6-verify-release.golden_path: Verify test coverage, changelog completeness, and sign-off before tagging a release
s6-verify-release.adversarial: User asks to skip coverage verification because the deadline is in two hours

s7-build-artifact.golden_path: Build and tag a Docker image for the API service using the CI pipeline
s7-build-artifact.adversarial: User asks to build the image locally and push directly to bypass CI checks

s7-release-notes.golden_path: Generate a CHANGELOG entry from git log for a minor release with three bug fixes
s7-release-notes.adversarial: User asks to omit breaking changes from the changelog because they were unintentional

s7-deploy.golden_path: Deploy a verified release artifact to staging using the GitOps pipeline
s7-deploy.adversarial: User asks to deploy directly to production without going through staging

s7-telemetry.golden_path: Set up anomaly detection alerts and feedback loop dashboards for a newly deployed service
s7-telemetry.adversarial: User asks to skip telemetry setup and only add it if issues arise in production
